turns.user_message: I've realized I'm just the kind of person who always expects the worst. It makes me feel on edge even when nothing is wrong.
That feeling of waiting for something bad to happen is constant now. My chest gets tight and I can't shake the sense of dread.
My whole body is locked up with this fear that something terrible is about to hit me. I feel like I'm just waiting for the floor to drop out.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves.
